Vulnerabilities.Title: OpenSSH: remote code execution in ssh-agent PKCS#11
Vulnerabilities.Description: The PKCS#11 feature in ssh-agent in OpenSSH allows remote code execution via a forwarded agent socket.

Vulnerabilities.Title: glibc: buffer overflow in ld.so (Looney Tunables)
Vulnerabilities.Description: A buffer overflow in the GNU C Library dynamic loader while processing the GLIBC_TUNABLES environment variable allows local privilege escalation.

Vulnerabilities.Title: gnutls: certificate verification bypass
Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw in GnuTLS certificate chain verification can lead to acceptance of an invalid certificate.

Vulnerabilities.Title: systemd: off-by-one buffer overflow in format_timespan
Vulnerabilities.Description: An off-by-one error in the systemd time span formatting routine can cause a denial of service.

Vulnerabilities.Title: ncurses: local privilege escalation via TERMINFO
Vulnerabilities.Description: ncurses before 6.4 allows setuid applications to be manipulated through crafted TERMINFO environment variables.

Vulnerabilities.Title: zlib: integer overflow in MiniZip zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64
Vulnerabilities.Description: MiniZip in zlib has an integer overflow and resultant heap-based buffer overflow via a long filename.

Vulnerabilities.Title: expat: use-after-free in doContent
Vulnerabilities.Description: libexpat has a use-after-free in the doContent function that can be triggered by crafted XML input.

Vulnerabilities.Title: openssl: denial of service via policy constraints
Vulnerabilities.Description: Excessive resource use when verifying X.509 certificate chains that include policy constraints can lead to a denial of service.

Vulnerabilities.Title: glibc: use-after-free in mq_notify
Vulnerabilities.Description: The mq_notify function in the GNU C Library has a use-after-free that may lead to application crash.

Vulnerabilities.Title: pydantic: regular expression denial of service (ReDoS)
Vulnerabilities.Description: A crafted email string can cause catastrophic backtracking in pydantic's email validation regex.

Vulnerabilities.Title: urllib3: Cookie header leak on cross-origin redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: urllib3 does not strip the Cookie header on cross-origin redirects, potentially leaking session data.

Vulnerabilities.Title: requests: certificate verification bypass on session reuse
Vulnerabilities.Description: When verify=False is set once on a Session it persists across subsequent requests, bypassing TLS verification.

Vulnerabilities.Title: requests: proxy Authorization header leak on redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: requests leaks the Proxy-Authorization header to the destination server when redirected across schemes.

Vulnerabilities.Title: setuptools: regular expression denial of service in package_index
Vulnerabilities.Description: setuptools is vulnerable to ReDoS via crafted HTML in the package index parser.

Vulnerabilities.Title: gunicorn: HTTP request smuggling via Transfer-Encoding
Vulnerabilities.Description: gunicorn improperly handles conflicting Transfer-Encoding headers, enabling HTTP request smuggling.

Vulnerabilities.Title: cryptography: Bleichenbacher timing oracle in RSA decryption
Vulnerabilities.Description: A timing side channel in RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 decryption allows recovery of the plaintext (Marvin attack).

Vulnerabilities.Title: protobuf: denial of service via crafted message parsing
Vulnerabilities.Description: A parsing issue in protobuf-python can lead to unbounded recursion and denial of service.
